description: The iconic ancient bridge of Dujiangyan, offering stunning views when illuminated at night, is a significant attraction in the ancient city of Dujiangyan.

attraction_name: Shu Feng Ya Yun Sichuan Opera Theater
description: A renowned venue in Chengdu for Sichuan opera performances, where visitors can enjoy authentic Sichuan opera face-changing and other traditional arts.
The first Taoist temple in Western Sichuan, originally built during the Tang Dynasty, rich in Taoist culture with exquisite architecture and thriving incense offerings.
An important archaeological site of ancient Shu civilization, the discovery site of the Sunbird gold ornament, showcasing ancient Shu culture from 3,000 years ago.
A popular snack hub near the University of Electronic Science and Technology, featuring a variety of Chengdu specialty snacks and vibrant night market culture.
A preserved Qing Dynasty street area, offering a classic alley experience of slow-paced old Chengdu life and culture.
A gathering place for Chengdu's artistic youth, this quiet and artistic street area is ideal for solo explorers.
A landmark building in Chengdu, with a rooftop panda sculpture that serves as a popular photo spot.
The only shrine in China dedicated to both ruler and subject, an important site for showcasing Three Kingdoms culture.
